presentation.summary: Fetch series, season, episode, and artwork metadata from TheTVDB.
presentation.description_markdown: Provides television metadata for series, seasons, and episodes, plus image resolution for TVDB artwork stored by Silo. It complements other providers when a library relies on TVDB identities or ordering.
presentation.setup_markdown: TVDB Metadata is installed as a default Silo plugin. Add or enable **TVDB** in a television library's metadata provider chain; no plugin-specific configuration is required.

capabilities.description: Resolves tvdb:// image paths to TheTVDB image URLs.
